name: The Back Nine Golf | Toms River, NJ
about: The Back Nine Golf in Toms River, NJ is a golf simulator venue that offers an indoor golf experience. The venue is accessible via its official website, though specific details about technology, amenities, and pricing are not currently available. It appears to be a dedicated space for golf simulation, catering to golfers seeking an indoor alternative to traditional course play.
